name: vwifi-tool
title: vwifi-tool
summary: userspace tool which supports user-specific utilization for vwifi-dkms
description:
userspace tool which supports user-specific utilization for vwifi-dkms
This package contains a tool which supports more user-specific utilization for
vwifi-dkms. It aims to provide more flexibility and customization for users of
vwifi-dkms.
Currently supporting feature:
* display the status of vwifi driver
* Use netlink socket to communicate with vwifi driver allowing user to
configure user-specific deny list

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for vwifi-tool.
arguments.raw: -tool  Option present in package usage line for vwifi-tool.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use vwifi-tool because userspace tool which supports user-specific utilization for vwifi-dkms.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use vwifi-tool as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `vwifi-tool [options] [args]` as documented upstream for vwifi-tool.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair vwifi-tool with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `vwifi-tool --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -tool
arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for vwifi-tool.
